scripts.dev:server: tsx watch --include server/**/* --include shared/**/* --exclude data/**/* --exclude client/**/* --exclude dist/**/* --exclude .git/**/* --exclude .manus-logs/**/* server/index.ts
scripts.test: node --run test:client && node --run test:server && node --run test:executor
scripts.smoke:release: node --run smoke:prod && node --run smoke:executor && node --run smoke:mission && node --run smoke:restart
scripts.test:release: node --run lint && node --run typecheck && node --run test && node --run build && node --run smoke:release && node --run guard:no-node-backend-api
